generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A pensive anthropomorphic leopard cat sitting under a gnarled tree, arms crossed, looking down at three golden cups on the grass with a look of dissatisfaction. A fourth cup is being offered from a cloud in the air, but the cat ignores it. Somber, shaded forest atmosphere. Muted blues and greens. Full bleed. No borders. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. Slender and agile feline build. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Four of Cups is 'The Insularity'—a leopard cat fixated on its current territory, ignoring a potential new corridor being offered by the landscape.

meanings.upright: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, re-evaluation, and being withdrawn.
meanings.reversed: New goals, end of stagnation, internal motivation, and seizing opportunities.

ecology.mapping_note: Four of Cups represents 'The Trap of the Familiar'—when a leopard cat is too comfortable in a sub-optimal fragment to notice a safer hidden corridor.

website.excerpt: Under the shade of the old tree, the leopard cat contemplates the world, unaware of the gift appearing in the mist.
website.seo_description: Four of Cups reimagined as a leopard cat in deep contemplation within an isolated forest patch.

meaning.zh: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, re-evaluation, and being withdrawn.
meaning.en: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, re-evaluation, and being withdrawn.
